message:
fix(transport): add PolledAfterCompletion guards to all stream/sink futures

Transport-layer futures (NextFuture, CollectToSetFuture,
NextWithCancelFuture, SendFuture, SendAllFuture, FlushFuture,
CloseFuture) previously had no protection against re-polling after
terminal completion, which could cause use-after-move or double-free
in the underlying I/O resources.

- stream.rs: NextFuture, CollectToSetFuture, NextWithCancelFuture now
  track completion via Option-wrapped inner state; re-poll returns
  StreamError::PolledAfterCompletion
- sink.rs: SendFuture, SendAllFuture, FlushFuture, CloseFuture use
  the same Option-tombstone pattern; re-poll returns
  SinkError::PolledAfterCompletion
- error.rs: Add StreamError::PolledAfterCompletion and
  SinkError::PolledAfterCompletion variants to the transport error
  enums, providing typed errors instead of panics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
